scripts.release:prepare: pnpm check && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:pack && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:pack:verify && pnpm release:bundle
scripts.test:e2e: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 NEXT_PUBLIC_VOICYCLAW_AUTH_MODE=local NEXT_PUBLIC_VOICYCLAW_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3101 VOICYCLAW_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3101 VOICYCLAW_WEB_PORT=3100 VOICYCLAW_SERVER_PORT=3101 pnpm build && PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 NEXT_PUBLIC_VOICYCLAW_AUTH_MODE=local NEXT_PUBLIC_VOICYCLAW_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3101 VOICYCLAW_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3101 VOICYCLAW_WEB_PORT=3100 VOICYCLAW_SERVER_PORT=3101 playwright test
scripts.build: pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot typecheck
scripts.plugin:voicyclaw:check: pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:install && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:lint && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:test && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:check && pnpm build
scripts.ci:check: pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:check && pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm lint && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:e2e
